nasb.text: But he answered them, “He who made me well was the one who said to me, ‘Pick up your pallet and walk.’”

esv.text: But he answered them, “The man who healed me, that man said to me, ‘Take up your bed, and walk.’”

cnv.text: 他卻回答：“那使我痊愈的對我說：‘拿起你的褥子走吧’。”

ccb.text: 他说：“那位医好我的叫我拿起垫子走。”

csbs.text: 他就回答：“是那个使我痊愈的人对我说‘拿起你的垫子走路吧。’”
